# SalaryCalculator.sg

> Singapore Salary Calculator for 2026 — Calculate take-home pay after CPF and income tax.

## About
SalaryCalculator.sg is a free online tool that calculates Singapore take-home salary after CPF (Central Provident Fund) contributions and income tax for Year of Assessment 2026.

## Features
- Gross-to-net salary calculation
- CPF contribution breakdown (Ordinary Account, Special Account, MediSave Account)
- Progressive income tax calculation with YA2026 brackets
- Support for Singapore Citizens, Permanent Residents (1st/2nd/3rd year+), and Foreigners
- Annual bonus / AWS handling with Additional Wage ceiling
- CPF Ordinary Wage ceiling ($6,800/month)
- Tax reliefs: Earned Income Relief, CPF Relief, NSman Relief
- Employer cost calculation

## Key Data Points
- CPF rates (Citizen, age ≤55): Employee 20%, Employer 17%
- OW Ceiling: $6,800/month
- AW Ceiling: $102,000 - annual OW subject to CPF
- Tax-free threshold: First $20,000
- Top marginal tax rate: 24% (above $1,000,000)
